title: 12" Wooden Broom Head with Stiff Hard Blue Bristle Brush – Garden Broom Outdoor for Yard Brush Sweeping - Wood Brush Head with Fitted Broom Handle Bracket
features: Versatile Heavy Duty Outdoor Broom - Featuring a hard beech stock of brush heads sweeping, this garden brush is perfect to clean leaves and any stubborn dirt in your garden, yard broom, paths or patio
Hard Bristle Broom – The 12 inches/30 cm patio outdoor broom heavy duty is made from stiff PET bristles for a firm cleaning action to scrub the stone, concrete, bricks, decking or driveways

Durable Broom Head Bracket - The brush head fittings are made of sturdy plastic for tough stiff brush support so that your floor scrubbing brush is ideal for all outdoor tasks. Fits most broom handles brace of 24 mm (not supplied)

Stiff Brush for Wet or Dry Use – This outdoor brush can withstand both wet and dry conditions, and can be used for a long time. Corrosion resistant broom bracket are also resilient in any weather conditions

Specifications - The wooden broom dimensions: 30 x 15 x 5.5 cm. Length of stiff broom bristles: 7 cm. Braid rows: 5 rows. Material composition: beech wood, natural Bassine, PET bristle. This outside broom is fitted with a fixing bracket connector
description: A great addition to your cleaning tools such as carpet brush, broom indoor, sweeping brush indoor or soft broom, this sweeping brush from Easy Peasy Mate was designed with domestic and professional heavy duty broom environments at heart. This hard bristle broom brush is a versatile product that can be used as a wet hard broom floor scrubber, stiff broom grout cleaning brush, or dry as a sweeping brush, garden brush and artificial grass brush and many more. It was made with hard stiff broom bristles suitable for vigorous heavy duty broom scrubbing. The plastic broom handle bracket ensures that the sweeping brush handle is stable and resistant to breakage under pressure. Even though the bristles are hard they do not cause any damage to surfaces when used as a floor scrubber. The ergonomic angled designed of the broom handle makes cleaning tough inside and outside brush household cleaning easier and effortless. The hard bristle broom brush itself is very durable, made from thick waterproofed wood that does not mould and only requires outside broom rinsing in order to maintain cleanness. The garden brush outdoor is an ideal push broom to sweep up large areas such as driveways, paths, patios and other garden areas. The hard brush is perfectly angled to give the best sweeping action. This stiff broom outdoor can sweep away large debris like grass or leaves but is also efficient in cleaning small dirt such as wood chips, dust and sands. This is also a perfect brush heads sweeping replacement - 12"/30 cm fitted with broom handle bracket for easy fixing to your wooden broom handle. A simple assembly with a broom handle (not supplied). Takes the most popular broom handles diameter 24 mm. Wide range of soft brush, indoor broom with soft black bristles, along with garden broom head in colour of orange, green, and yellow are also available
